display.purpose: Hero headlines only. Two-line max. Tight leading and extreme negative tracking make the type architectural.

headline.purpose: Section headings, contact heading, mobile menu items. Same 900 weight as display, reduced scale.

body.purpose: Sublines, about copy, work card descriptions. Medium weight for legibility at fluid scale.

label.purpose: Footer meta, availability text, utility link labels. Fixed 13px — outside the fluid scale system.

tag.purpose: Work card engagement chips. Semibold uppercase with wide tracking for clarity at small size.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: All Framer Motion transitions. Sharp exit exponential ease — responsive without bounce.

motion.name: duration-colors
motion.purpose: Hover state colour shifts on links and buttons.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main CTA. White fill, near-black text, full pill. Hover shifts text to Overcast Steel — fill stays white.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: #ffffff; color: #111827; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: 'Urbanist', ui-sans-serif, sans-serif; font-size: 32px; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1; padding: 24px 40px; text-decoration: none; white-space: nowrap; cursor: pointer; transition: color 150ms ease; border: none; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { color: #768B9B; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary CTA variant. Transparent fill with low-opacity white border. Hover shifts text and border to Overcast Steel.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: transparent; color: #ffffff; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.20); border-radius: 9999px; font-family: 'Urbanist', ui-sans-serif, sans-serif; font-size: 24px; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1; padding: 20px 32px; text-decoration: none; white-space: nowrap; cursor: pointer; transition: color 150ms ease, border-color 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { color: #768B9B; border-color: #768B9B; }

components.name: Work Card Tag
components.description: Engagement type label on work cards. Uppercase, wide tracking, pill shape. Dark-surface variant shown.
components.css: .ds-tag { display: inline-block; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08); color: #e5e5e5; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: 'Urbanist', ui-sans-serif, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 4px 12px; line-height: 1; }

components.name: Nav Link
components.description: Desktop navigation. Plain text, no underline, no pill. Hover shifts to Overcast Steel.
components.html: WorkAboutLaws & PatternsContact
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 24px; } .ds-nav-link { color: #ffffff; font-family: 'Urbanist', ui-sans-serif, sans-serif; font-size: 24px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1; text-decoration: none; transition: color 150ms ease; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #768B9B; }

components.name: Work Card
components.description: Signature full-viewport stacking scroll card. Shown here as a static snapshot: dark variant (Finnova).
components.html:
Core Banking Platform
Embedded · 1 year & counting

One year embedded as senior design partner on one of Switzerland's leading core banking platforms.

View project →
components.css: .ds-work-card { width: 100%; border-radius: 12px; overflow: hidden; display: flex; flex-direction: column; background: #0e0e10; height: 540px; } .ds-work-card__image { flex: 1; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: #0e0e10; } .ds-work-card__placeholder { font-family: 'Urbanist', ui-sans-serif, sans-serif; font-weight: 900; font-size: 48px; color: #ffffff; opacity: 0.1; } .ds-work-card__footer { flex: none; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 16px; padding: 24px; background: #0a0a0f; min-height: 120px; } .ds-work-card__meta { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; } .ds-work-card__tag { display: inline-block; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08); color: #e5e5e5; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: 'Urbanist', ui-sans-serif, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 4px 12px; width: fit-content; } .ds-work-card__desc { font-family: 'Urbanist', ui-sans-serif, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.5; color: #e5e5e5; margin: 0; } .ds-work-card__cta { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: #ffffff; color: #111827; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: 'Urbanist', ui-sans-serif, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; padding: 12px 20px; text-decoration: none; transition: color 150ms ease; align-self: flex-start; } .ds-work-card__cta:hover { color: #768B9B; }

narrative.overview:
This is a portfolio where the site itself is the argument. Every design decision is a demonstration of what a Design Engineer does — the typography commands authority rather than requesting attention, the spacing is deliberate rather than templated, the motion is polite rather than performative. Nothing is given for free.

The system is built on a single dark base: near-black body (#111827) with a deeper accent surface (#06080E) that creates tonal depth without shadows. One accent colour, Overcast Steel (#768B9B), appears only on hover states, secondary labels, and utility chrome. Its restraint is the point — when it appears, it means something.

This is not a 'dark mode portfolio.' The physical scene: a senior partner at a Swiss bank opens a laptop in a meeting room, mid-afternoon, evaluating an engagement. The interface reads immediately and holds its ground. Nothing asks to be noticed. Everything rewards attention.
keyCharacteristics: Single-font system (Urbanist) across all weights and scales
Tonal depth through surface layering, not shadows
Display type at 140px max — typography is the primary design element
One accent colour, appearing on ≤10% of any surface
Motion eases out sharply (cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1)) — responsive, not theatrical
Geometric SVG shapes in #06080E float on #111827 as structural background texture

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Overcast Steel (#768B9B) is used on ≤10% of any given screen. It appears on hover, on secondary labels, on utility chrome. It never competes with headlines. Its rarity is the mechanism.

rules.name: The No-Warmth Rule
rules.body: Every background surface has zero warm chroma. Light surfaces (#FAFAF9) appear only inside contained work cards, never as page grounds.

rules.name: The Single-Face Rule
rules.body: Urbanist everywhere, zero exceptions. No monospace sections, no fallback decorative faces. Typographic hierarchy comes from weight and scale contrast alone.

rules.name: The Tight Display Rule
rules.body: Display headings use letter-spacing: -0.05em and line-height: 0.86. These are intentional compressions that make the type feel architectural rather than set.

rules.name: The Shadow-Free Rule
rules.body: No box-shadow is permitted. Depth is structural, not atmospheric. If you are reaching for a shadow, reconsider whether a background tint change achieves the same depth.

dos: Do use Overcast Steel (#768B9B) exclusively for hover states, secondary labels, and utility chrome. Never for headlines or body copy.
Do use letter-spacing: -0.05em and line-height: 0.86 for Display-size type.
Do use cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1) for all Framer Motion transitions.
Do let section headings break the left-flush convention when it creates visual rhythm.
Do use tonal surface layering (#06080E on #111827) to create depth — not shadows.
Do keep buttons to transition-colors only. No translateY, scale, or glow on hover.
Do vary section vertical padding for rhythm.
donts: Don't use box-shadow anywhere. Use background tint changes for depth.
Don't add gradient text (background-clip: text + gradient). Explicitly banned.
Don't use Inter, system-ui, or any font other than Urbanist.
Don't use purple gradients, neon accents, or glassmorphism.
Don't build identical card grids (icon + heading + text, repeated).
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a coloured accent stripe.
Don't use the hero-metric template (big number, small label, gradient accent).
Don't use standard agency portfolio structure: hero + work grid + contact form.
Don't use Tailwind UI defaults (shadcn components, zinc palette, standard rounded-lg cards).
Don't add motion that makes the user wait or fights their scroll.
Don't apply a generic container (max-w-7xl mx-auto) to sections.
